scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && pnpm --filter @hesper/persistence build && pnpm --filter @hesper/tools build && pnpm --filter @hesper/agent-runtime build && pnpm --filter @hesper/app-core build && vite build --config renderer/vite.config.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && node scripts/fix-esm-imports.mjs ../../packages/shared/dist ../../packages/persistence/dist ../../packages/app-core/dist ../../packages/agent-runtime/dist ../../packages/tools/dist ../../packages/ui/dist dist/electron && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 renderer" "tsc -w -p tsconfig.build.json" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist/electron/main.js && electron ."
scripts.e2e: node scripts/fix-esm-imports.mjs ../../packages/shared/dist ../../packages/persistence/dist ../../packages/app-core/dist ../../packages/agent-runtime/dist ../../packages/tools/dist ../../packages/ui/dist dist/electron && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
